title: Unique 30897EU - Eco-Friendly Paper Plates - 23 cm - Baby Blue Colour - 8 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Pack of 8 Baby Blue Party Plates
Paper plates measure approximately 23 cm in diameter
Ideal for serving food at a birthday party, christening or baby shower
Combine with other baby blue party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Your special occasions, dinner parties and last minute get-togethers just got a little easier with our eco-friendly baby blue paper plates. This pack of light blue paper plates is a convenient way to add some delicate blue colour to your christening, baby shower, first birthday, wedding, and more. These disposable plates also make cleaning up after the party is over really quick and easy. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
